description: OS Utils for Nim, simple tiny but useful procs for OS. Turn Display OFF and set Process Name.

releases.d: OS Utils for Nim, simple tiny but useful procs for OS. Turn Display OFF, set Process Name, set Process CPU Usage Limit cap from 5% to 100% on global percentage.
